settings.heading: We will fix your broken metabolism.
settings.text:
Traditional diets don't work because nearly 70% of weight is genetically determined. GLP-1 is a naturally occurring hormone that regulates appetite and blood sugar — so you work with your body, not against it.

Join the 500,000+ MEDVi patients who finally got real, lasting results.

settings.heading: Why so many patients choose MEDVi.
settings.subheading: It's not magic — it's metabolic science. And the data doesn't lie.

settings.heading: The change we've all been waiting for.
settings.subheading: On average, MEDVi patients lose 15–20% of their body weight. Join the ones who got their life back.

settings.heading: Begin your weight loss journey with MEDVi.
settings.subheading: Three simple steps from sign-up to your first dose — no commitment, cancel any time.

settings.heading: Get Approved
settings.text: Complete a quick online evaluation to determine if GLP-1 medication is right for you. Our team of licensed professionals will review your information and provide approval in no time.

settings.heading: Get Prescribed
settings.text: Once approved, you'll receive personalized care and a prescription to support your weight loss goals. Your plan is designed to help you achieve lasting results safely and effectively.

settings.heading: Receive Your Rx
settings.text: Your medication is shipped directly to your door for maximum convenience. Starting is as simple as opening your package and following our easy-to-use instructions.

settings.heading: Unlimited 24/7 support included.
settings.text: MEDVi provides 24/7 access to a dedicated team of specialists. With unlimited appointments, messaging and support, you can confidently reach out for guidance, ask questions, or address concerns at any time.

settings.heading: Unlimited messaging
settings.text: Text your care team any time, 24/7.

settings.heading: Direct-to-door shipping
settings.text: Free, fast delivery straight from a US pharmacy.

settings.question: How much does the program cost?
settings.answer: The MEDVi Semaglutide program starts at $179 for your first month with no contract. This covers your physician review, full personalized plan, 1:1 guidance, metabolic report, and the cost of the medication shipped to your door. Refills are locked in at $299 and include all the same program benefits.

settings.question: Will this work for me?
settings.answer: Our providers explore prescribing compounded GLP-1 medications for you, if appropriate. Compounded medication can provide incredible results using active GLP-1 ingredients that help you reach your goals.

settings.question: What if my insurance doesn't cover the medication?
settings.answer: All MEDVi prescriptions are cash-pay, so you never deal with insurance headaches. Your insurance may reimburse you for branded options, and we keep compounded medications fairly priced so no insurance is necessary.

settings.question: What can I expect after I sign up?
settings.answer: After your online visit, our medical providers review your answers and determine whether treatment may be right for you. If appropriate, your prescription ships directly from the pharmacy to your door.

settings.question: Is the medication FDA-approved?
settings.answer: Wegovy® is FDA-approved for weight loss; Ozempic® is FDA-approved for type 2 diabetes. Compounded GLP-1s are produced in FDA-regulated facilities, though the compounds themselves are not FDA-evaluated. Your clinician will review the specific risks and benefits with you.

settings.question: Can I cancel at any time?
settings.answer: Yes. There's no contract and no commitment — pause or cancel whenever you like from your MEDVi account.

settings.heading: What's your weight loss goal?
settings.text: See if you qualify in under 3 minutes. No contract, free shipping, unlimited support — and a doctor-led plan waiting for you.
